title: "Our Share Of Night To Bear"
content:
Our share of night to bear,
    Our share of morning,
    Our blank in bliss to fill,
    Our blank in scorning.

    Here a star, and there a star,
    Some lose their way.
    Here a mist, and there a mist,
    Afterwards -- day!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled ""Our Share Of Night To Bear"", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
